nasb.text: Some of their relatives of the sons of the Kohathites were over the showbread to prepare it every sabbath.

esv.text: Also some of their kinsmen of the Kohathites had charge of the showbread, to prepare it every Sabbath.

cnv.text: 他們的親族哥轄的子孫中，有管理陳設餅的，每安息日要預備擺設。

ccb.text: 哥辖宗族中还有些人负责预备每个安息日需用的供饼。
